title: vigna helicopus
intro: Vigna helicopus, also known as the catjang pea, is a type of climbing or prostrate annual legume native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and diarrhea, due to its anthelmintic and laxative effects. The health benefits of Vigna helicopus include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer. Vigna helicopus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used as a food source, where it can be cooked and consumed as a legume.
